name: Easter Egg Nests
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the dark chocolate candy and let it cool slightly.
2. Gently mix the chow mein noodles into the melted chocolate, taking care not to break them.
3. Once the chocolate has cooled enough to handle, mold the mixture into small bird-shaped nests.
4. Before the mixture has time to harden completely, place jelly beans or small Easter candy eggs into each nest.
5. The jelly beans will stay in place once the mixture cools and sets.
This recipe is easy and fun to make. Use your imagination for items you could place in the nests.
